channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  5. Moonshot’s Kimi K3 pushes Chinese AI into Fable-level territory  Fortune

item.title: Crypto regulatory text expected to be released Thursday does not have Senate Democrat support - Politico
item.description:
1. Crypto regulatory text expected to be released Thursday does not have Senate Democrat support  Politico
  2. The time for Clarity is here: Congress has a chance to pass the most important technology law since the Telecoms Act  Fortune
  3. Trump Meets With Senators in Last Push for Clarity Act. Why It Matters for Coinbase.  Barron's
  4. Trump calls for Congress to pass Clarity Act crypto bill to honor Lindsey Graham  CNBC
  5. The CLARITY Act Delay Is Now A Compliance Problem, Not Just A Political One  Forbes

item.title: Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports - CNBC
item.description:
1. Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports  CNBC
